category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison - China export to Vanuatu.

title.en: China-to-Vanuatu EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入瓦努阿图：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入萬那杜：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Vanuatu VBSI, URA, UNELCO, and VUI expectations, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, Vanuatu 230/400 V 50 Hz grid conditions, cyclone and salt-mist derating, Port Vila sea-freight realities, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与瓦努阿图VBSI、URA、UNELCO和VUI预期、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、IEC 61000 EMC证据、瓦努阿图230/400 V 50 Hz电网条件、气旋和盐雾降额、维拉港海运现实，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與萬那杜VBSI、URA、UNELCO和VUI預期、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、IEC 61000 EMC證據、萬那杜230/400 V 50 Hz電網條件、氣旋和鹽霧降額、維拉港海運現實，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Vanuatu, the practical gaps are IEC-aligned product evidence, connector conversion from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC, URA-regulated utility or concessionaire project acceptance with UNELCO in Port Vila and VUI in relevant service areas, EMC and power-quality evidence under IEC 61000 practice, and environmental derating for cyclone exposure, salt mist, humidity, corrosion, surge, and island logistics. Vanuatu uses 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The frequency is the same as China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline, so input-voltage range, protection settings, cable ratings, and thermal derating must be confirmed. Vanuatu's EV market is essentially non-existent or very early, and an EVSE-specific national whole-unit certification rule could not be confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current VBSI, URA, utility, customs, HS-code, and project route before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入瓦努阿图时，实务差距包括：IEC体系产品证据；接口从GB/T 20234转换为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；在URA监管下由维拉港UNELCO及相关服务区VUI等公用事业或特许经营方进行项目接入验收；IEC 61000实践下的EMC和电能质量证据；以及针对气旋、盐雾、高湿、腐蚀、浪涌和岛国物流的环境降额。瓦努阿图采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线，因此必须确认输入电压范围、保护设置、电缆额定值和热降额。截至2026年6月14日，瓦努阿图电动汽车市场基本不存在或处于很早期，未能从官方公开来源确认已有专门适用于EVSE整机的国家强制认证规则；出口商应在出货前核实现行VBSI、URA、公用事业、海关、HS编码和项目路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入萬那杜時，實務差距包括：IEC體系產品證據；接口從GB/T 20234轉換為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；在URA監管下由維拉港UNELCO及相關服務區VUI等公用事業或特許經營方進行項目接入驗收；IEC 61000實踐下的EMC和電能質量證據；以及針對氣旋、鹽霧、高濕、腐蝕、浪湧和島國物流的環境降額。萬那杜採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線，因此必須確認輸入電壓範圍、保護設置、電纜額定值和熱降額。截至2026年6月14日，萬那杜電動汽車市場基本不存在或處於很早期，未能從官方公開來源確認已有專門適用於EVSE整機的國家強制認證規則；出口商應在出貨前核實現行VBSI、URA、公用事業、海關、HS編碼和項目路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, VBSI or URA scope determination, UNELCO or VUI connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Vanuatu conformity assessment rules, URA and utility project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、VBSI或URA适用范围裁定、UNELCO或VUI接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行瓦努阿图合格评定规则、URA及公用事业项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、VBSI或URA適用範圍裁定、UNELCO或VUI接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行萬那杜合格評定規則、URA及公用事業項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
